criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, measured by metrics such as daily active users, session duration, and retention rates.
criteria.sources: App analytics platforms, user reviews, and app store metrics.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app, such as chatbots, recommendation systems, and personalization algorithms.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and technical analyses.

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating and sentiment of user reviews on app stores, reflecting user satisfaction and feedback.
criteria.sources: App store listings and third-party review aggregators.

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: The app's originality and innovative features that set it apart from competitors in the social networking category.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, tech blogs, and app award recognitions.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The app's measures to protect user data and privacy, including encryption, secure authentication, and compliance with data protection regulations.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, security audits, and user feedback.
